title: Some kind of Evangelion fair
wikitext:
[]: Some kind of Evangelion fair?             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Jan 08, 2015 11:33 pm Maybe somebody with better moon than I can look at this link? It looks like there's some kind of an Evangelion fair happening to commemorate the 20th anniversary of the show, but I don't want to confirm or spread rumors without being able to fully understand what I'm reading.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Jan 08, 2015 11:45 pm They have these pretty much constantly for any reason imaginable 7-11 thing was a Fair http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3409.html X'Mas Jewelry Fair http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3447.html Valentine Fair http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2788.html Yurushito Fair http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2948.html (a tiny sample from just the past year) Just pimping the Eva Store and shoveling merch out the door.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Jan 09, 2015 4:25 pm I missed my chance to hit up the original Evastore. But, the smaller Ikebukuro incarnation will still easily bleed you dry and Eva-Ya in Hakone is a must visit.
